utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: So c mon , you guys , tell me all the dirt !

utterances.speaker: Kiki
utterances.text: Well , the biggest news is still you dumping Barry at the altar !

emotion_cause.span: 2_the biggest news is still you dumping Barry at the altar !

utterances.speaker: Joanne
utterances.text: Alright . Let talk reality for a second .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: I am not ! This is what I am doing now . I have got this job ...

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Okay , I am not just waitressing . I am ... I , um ...

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: I write the specials on the specials board , and , uh ...

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: and I , uh ... I take the uh dead flowers out of the vase ... Oh , and , um , sometimes Artelle lets me put the little chocolate blobbies on the cookies .
